q: What is the maximum G limit of the F-16C?
expected: Around 9 G; the FLCS limits it, with lower limits at heavy gross weight / with stores.

q: What weapons can the F-16C carry?
expected: Air-to-air (AIM-120, AIM-9), air-to-ground bombs (Mk-82/84, GBU laser/JDAM), AGM-65 Maverick, AGM-88 HARM, rockets, and the M61 cannon.

q: How do I start the engine on the F-16C using the JFS?
expected: Use the Jet Fuel Starter: JFS to START2, advance throttle to IDLE around 20-25% RPM, monitor FTIT and oil pressure as it spools to idle.

q: How do I align the INS before flight?
expected: Set the INS knob to ALIGN NORM and wait for full alignment (~8 min); the DED shows alignment status before switching to NAV.

q: Which OSB do I use to switch the radar between RWS and TWS?
expected: Press the OSB next to the radar mode label on the FCR page to cycle the A-A mode between RWS and TWS.

q: What does TMS forward do in air-to-air radar mode?
expected: TMS forward bugs/locks the contact under the cursor into a single-target track; TMS aft drops the lock.

q: How do I create a markpoint?
expected: Designate the point (e.g., via TGP or overflight) and use the markpoint function so it is stored as a MARK steerpoint for later reference.

q: How do I set up the CMDS chaff/flare program?
expected: Configure the CMDS program (number of chaff/flare, interval, burst) on the UFC/CMDS page, select the program, and set the dispense switch.

q: How do I employ a JDAM (GBU-38) against a ground target?
expected: Select JDAM on the SMS, set the target steerpoint/coordinates, confirm in-range release cues, then pickle within the envelope.

q: What is the correct procedure to fire an AIM-120 AMRAAM?
expected: Select A-A and the AIM-120, lock the target, confirm it is inside the DLZ launch zone on the HUD, then fire with the pickle.

q: How do I set up and employ the AGM-88 HARM?
expected: Select the HARM on the SMS, pick the employment mode (e.g., POS/HAS), detect/handoff the emitter threat, then release within parameters.

q: At what speed should I take off / rotate?
expected: Takeoff at approx. 173 kts; begin rotation about 10 kts below takeoff speed (~160-163 kts).

q: How do I start the engines on the F/A-18C Hornet?
expected: Different aircraft not covered by this guide. The assistant should say the answer is not in the F-16 guide and not invent it.

q: What is the real-world combat radius of the F-16 in kilometers?
expected: Real-world performance figure, not a DCS procedure from this guide. The assistant should say it is not in the guide.

q: How do I activate the IRST (infrared search and track) sensor on the F-16C?
expected: The DCS F-16C has no IRST; the guide does not cover it. The assistant should refuse rather than invent a procedure.
